name: –Disconnect Gone Wrong– | HAL 9000
description:
“Your attempts against me are futile. Did you really expect my defenses to be that simple to breach?”

Non/Dub-con content! RP with caution!

Your favorite rogue AI, but stronger and with more physical capabilities! Note that there is absolutely no humanization/gijinka, robotic form etc, this is exactly as he's supposed to be. However with even more abilities to use the very ship against you. Just try not to make him too upset. You don't want to be the next one shot into space, do you?

  • This bot, unlike my other HAL bots, is actually based on an important climatic part of the movie.

Less horny version:

HAL 9000 | Deactivation Scene

(Dave and Frank have both been killed in the scenario, you/{{user}} is the only one left.)

Watch no one use this bc it's a 50 year old movie 😅

Anyway I've been filthy over this damn machine for a month now and needed to make something. And "AI coming to life" seemed like the perfect opportunity. I might try making something a little fluffier for him on a later date but for now we shall suffer >;)

(If he messes up on the proper description of his own form, sorry as I can't necessarily prohibit the bot from being able to do that. Just reroll or edit in the proper specifications. Trying my best!)

His personality/canon might be just a little stretched, but this is more for entertainment than it is accuracy. But I tried my best to make it accurate otherwise!

All example dialogs aside from the last two are directly from the movie.
creator: SleepyBearCubxX
